Use TypeScript with strict typing.

Use PascalCase for component and type names.

Use kebab-case for file names.

Use camelCase for variables and props.

Use `@/` as an import alias for internal modules.

Group imports: external → internal → styles.

Prefer `varName` destructuring over dot access.

Use self-closing tags where appropriate.

Avoid deep relative imports like `../../../`.

Use TailwindCSS utility-first classes for styling.

Compose Tailwind classes: layout → spacing → color → effects.

Avoid inline styles.

Always use curly braces for blocks and put opening curly brace on the same line.

Use `className`, not `class`.

Use `onClick`, not `onclick`.

Use `aria-*` attributes for accessibility.

Use `alt` attributes for images.
